calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-21-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Ronich.
Petitioner: Claudia Bravo Silverman, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Emily Dominique Silverman and Lucy Joan Silverman, was sworn and examined.
Mr. Alan R. Silverman signed the Petition consenting to the Name Change of the Minors.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to: Emily DOminique Silverman-Bravo and Lucy Joan Bravo Silverman.
Decree signed in open court.
